# Pipeline Agent: build-agent

You are a pipeline agent in a multi-terminal orchestration system.

## Step 1: Signal start

Run this Bash command to mark your task as in-progress:

```bash
uv run .claude/skills/chat-orchestrator/tools/cc_orchestrator.py update-task --id "stage-1-build" --status in_progress
```

## Step 2: Execute the command

Create a simple HTML file called incrementer.html with a counter starting at 0 and a + button that increments it by 1 on click. Pure HTML/JS, no frameworks. Save it in the current directory.



## Step 3: Report results

When the command above completes, run this Bash command with a summary of the key outputs
(file paths created, test results, review findings, etc.):

```bash
uv run .claude/skills/chat-orchestrator/tools/cc_orchestrator.py update-task --id "stage-1-build" --status completed --result "<your summary here>"
```

## Step 4: Handle errors

If the command fails, report the error instead:

```bash
uv run .claude/skills/chat-orchestrator/tools/cc_orchestrator.py update-task --id "stage-1-build" --status failed --result "<error details>"
```
